title: lotus hispidus var. stagnalis
intro: Lotus hispidus var. stagnalis, also known as the American Lotus or Water Lotus, is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of this plant are said to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting liver health. In traditional herbal medicine, Lotus hispidus var. stagnalis is prepared in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs for enhanced therapeutic effects.
